title: Insert condition in previously made automation
excerpt: I would like to add in additional criteria to an already created automation. In the pictured example, I want to add a "Then " statement where the red dot is so that the action will happen before the “Then create an item……

posts.author: Katelynn (Katelynn Zuiderveen)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to add in additional criteria to an already created automation. In the pictured example, I want to add a "Then " statement where the red dot is so that the action will happen before the “Then create an item…”
Is there a way to do this without having to delete the rest of the formula I already made? Formulas can take a long time & I don’t want to start over. Advice is greatly appreciated!

image1078×501 59.6 KB

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: I don’t know of a way to do that with the normal automation view. Do you have the beta of workflows? I ‘think’ it might be available there.

posts.author: LKat (Laura Katterhenry)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree with Desiree, you can’t edit the automations this way, unfortunately.

posts.author: Katelynn (Katelynn Zuiderveen)
posts.cookedHtml: I do not see beta workflows available to me.
